title: Add backpressure support
description: Flow control for fast producers / slow consumers. Consider strategies: drop, buffer, latest-only. Significant architectural consideration.

title: Add distinct operator
description: Filter for global uniqueness across the stream lifetime. Unlike deduped (consecutive duplicates only), distinct tracks all seen values. May need HashSet internally.

title: Add finalize operator
description: Run cleanup callback on completion or unsubscribe. Useful for resource cleanup. Depends on completion signals (rx3-0tw).

title: Add skip_while operator
description: Skip emissions while predicate returns true, then emit all subsequent values. Complement to take_while (rx3-mtd).

title: Add start_with operator
description: Prepend initial value(s) to a stream. Useful for providing default/seed values before the first emission.

title: Add zip operator
description: Pair emissions 1:1 from two sources. Unlike combine (which fires on any change), zip waits for both sources to emit before pairing. Requires same or compatible cadence between sources.

title: Add sample operator
description: Emit the latest value from source whenever a sampler/notifier fires. Useful for rate-limiting based on external signals.

title: Add default_if_empty operator
description: Emit a default value if the stream completes without emitting anything. Depends on completion signals (rx3-0tw).

title: Error propagation and handling
close_reason: Implemented Result<T,E> wrapper approach with try_map, map_ok, map_err, catch_error, unwrap_or, unwrap_or_else operators

title: Add concat operator
description: Sequential stream composition - subscribe to second source after first completes. Depends on completion signals (rx3-0tw).

title: Add merge operator
description: Combine multiple streams of the same type T into one stream. All sources must have the same inner type. Emits whenever any source emits.

title: Add combine_latest operator
description: Operator form of the combine! macro. Emits tuple of latest values whenever any source emits. Alternative API to the macro for cases where operator chaining is preferred.
